title: firrtl: Add support for yosys' $lut cell

features.name: yosys lut cell with concatenation-based index
features.description: Code should include a yosys $lut cell where the LUT index is built from concatenated wire references

features.name: lut encoded as constant right-shift
features.description: Code should include a LUT encoded as a constant value shifted right by a concatenation of select signals

features.name: dynamic shift-right with concatenated index
features.description: Code should include a dynamic shift-right operation where the shift amount is a concatenation of multiple signals
